D. 
SUBMISSIONS ON BEHALF OF THE RESPONDENT NOS. 1-4
20. Ms. Supreeta Sharanagouda, the learned Counsel for respondent/
defendant Nos. 1-4, submitted that the plaintiff, in his cross-
examination, admitted that he had no documents to show that 
he possessed the requisite amount to pay the balance sale 
consideration. Further, it was argued that the additional documents 
sought to be produced by the plaintiff also disclosed his financial 
incapacity from the date of execution of the ATS until the filing of the 
suit. The learned Counsel, relying upon Pydi Ramana v. Davarasety 
Manmadha Rao, reported in (2024) 7 SCC 515, asserted that the 
plaintiff failed to show his “readiness” and “willingness” to perform 
the contract.
